channel.title: Paper Tools
channel.description: Free, private PDF & file tools that run entirely in your browser — no uploads, no signup.

item.title: Flatten PDF
item.description: Flatten PDF annotations and form appearances online — free & private. Turn visible stamps, signatures and form widgets into regular page content right in your browser; no upload, no signup.

item.title: Markdown to PDF
item.description: Convert Markdown to PDF online — free & private, with Korean support. Drop a .md file right in your browser; no upload, no signup.

item.title: Stamp / Signature on PDF
item.description: Add a stamp or signature to a PDF online — free & private. Place a PNG/JPG image at any position, size and opacity right in your browser; no upload, no signup.

item.title: Image Resize
item.description: Resize images online — free & private. Shrink PNG, JPG or GIF to a max width/height right in your browser; never upscales, no upload, no signup.

item.title: Excel to CSV Converter
item.description: Convert Excel to CSV online — free & private. Turn .xlsx sheets into CSV (or a ZIP of CSVs) right in your browser; files never upload, no signup.

item.title: Compare PDFs
item.description: Compare two PDFs online — free & private. See exactly what text changed between two versions right in your browser; files never upload, no signup.

item.title: Insert Blank PDF Page
item.description: Insert a blank page into a PDF online — free & private. Add blank pages anywhere right in your browser; files never upload, no signup.

item.title: Compress PDF
item.description: Compress PDF online — free & private. Shrink file size by recompressing images right in your browser; files never upload, no signup.

item.title: Crop PDF
item.description: Crop PDF margins online — free & private. Trim page edges right in your browser; files never leave your device, no upload, no signup.

item.title: Word to Hangul Converter
item.description: Convert Word to Hangul HWPX online — free & private. Turn .docx text and paragraphs into .hwpx right in your browser; no upload, no signup.

item.title: Word to PDF Converter
item.description: Convert Word to PDF online — free & private. Turn .docx text into a PDF right in your browser (text-focused); files never upload, no signup.

item.title: Old Hangul HWP to PDF
item.description: Convert old Hangul HWP to PDF online — free & private. Turn .hwp text into a PDF right in your browser (text-focused); no upload, no signup.

item.title: Hangul to Word Converter
item.description: Convert Hangul HWPX to Word online — free & private. Turn .hwpx text and paragraphs into .docx right in your browser; no upload, no signup.

item.title: Hangul HWPX to PDF
item.description: Convert Hangul HWPX to PDF online — free & private. Turn .hwpx text into a PDF right in your browser (text-focused); no upload, no signup.

item.title: Images to PDF
item.description: Convert images to PDF online — free & private. Turn PNG or JPG images into PDF pages right in your browser; files never upload, no signup.

item.title: Image Converter
item.description: Convert images online — free & private. Convert between PNG, JPG and GIF right in your browser; files never upload, no signup required.

item.title: PDF Info & Page Count
item.description: Check PDF info online — free & private. View page count, size and metadata right in your browser; files never upload, no signup required.

item.title: Interleave PDF
item.description: Interleave PDF pages online — free & private. Merge front and back scans into correct page order right in your browser; no upload, no signup.

item.title: Merge PDF
item.description: Merge PDF files online — free & private. Combine multiple PDFs into one right in your browser; files never upload, no signup.

item.title: Edit PDF Metadata
item.description: Edit PDF metadata online — free & private. Change or remove title, author and more right in your browser; files never upload, no signup.

item.title: N-up PDF Printing
item.description: Print multiple PDF pages per sheet (N-up) online — free & private. Combine 2 or 4 pages per sheet right in your browser; no upload, no signup.

item.title: Add Page Numbers to PDF
item.description: Add page numbers to PDF online — free & private. Number every page at the bottom center right in your browser; no upload, no signup.

item.title: Extract Images from PDF
item.description: Extract images from PDF online — free & private. Pull embedded images out into a ZIP right in your browser; files never upload, no signup.

item.title: PDF to Images
item.description: Convert PDF pages to images online — free & private. Render each page as PNG or JPG right in your browser; files never upload, no signup.

item.title: PDF to Text
item.description: Extract text from PDF online — free & private. Pull selectable text into a .txt file right in your browser; files never upload, no signup.

item.title: Protect PDF with Password
item.description: Password protect PDF online — free & private. Encrypt a PDF with an AES-128 password right in your browser; files never upload, no signup.

item.title: Remove PDF Pages
item.description: Remove PDF pages online — free & private. Delete pages you don't need right in your browser; files never leave your device, no signup.

item.title: Reorder PDF Pages
item.description: Reorder PDF pages online — free & private. Rearrange pages into any order right in your browser; no upload, no install, no signup required.

item.title: Resize PDF Pages
item.description: Resize PDF pages online — free & private. Make every page a uniform size like A4, right in your browser; no upload, no signup.

item.title: Rotate PDF
item.description: Rotate PDF pages online — free & private. Turn pages 90, 180 or 270 degrees right in your browser; files never upload, no signup.

item.title: Split PDF
item.description: Split PDF online — free & private. Extract just the pages you need into a new file, right in your browser; files never upload, no signup.

item.title: Text to PDF
item.description: Convert text to PDF online — free & private, with Korean support. Paste text or drop a .txt file right in your browser; no upload, no signup.

item.title: Unlock PDF
item.description: Unlock PDF online — free & private. Remove a password you know right in your browser; files never leave your device, no upload, no signup.

item.title: Watermark PDF
item.description: Add a watermark to PDF online — free & private. Stamp text diagonally across every page right in your browser; no upload, no signup.
